description: The AutoLookAtUser component can be used to make a slot rotate towards a given user or some user that is close to it.

fields.RetargetDistance: The distance that the current target needs to be from the slot for it to pick a new target.
fields.LerpSpeed: The speed at which the slot rotates towards its target.
fields.TargetedUser: The user that the slot is currently looking at.
fields.AutoTarget: Whether or not the component should pick its own target.
fields.ExcludeActiveUser: If this is true and the slot with this component is parented to a user, it won't look at that user.
fields.SwingReference: The first axis in which to restrict rotation essentially.
fields.TwistReference: The second axis in which to restrict rotation essentially, for best results, make this axis perpendicular to ``SwingReference``.
fields.MaxSwing: How much this can rotate on the ``SwingReference`` axis.
fields.MaxTwist: How much this can rotate on the ``TwistReference`` axis.
fields._rotation: The rotation field to drive with this component's calculations. Usually this is the slot that this component is on.
